name: Consensus Assessment Initiative Questionnaire
description: Vendor self-assessment questionnaire derived from CCM v4.1. 490 yes/no questions reflecting CCM v4.1's expanded control set (207 controls in v4.1 vs 197 in v4.0).
relationToCloudSecurity: Current CSA STAR Registry attestation questionnaire.
relationToAISecurity: Covers general cloud security; AI-specific controls in AICM.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

current_extraction.notes: Direct download of upstream-published data; no transformation applied.

notes: Use alongside CCM v4.1 for vendor assessments.
